sentences.arabic: يَتَجَلَّى التَّحَوُّلُ الَّذِي تَشْهَدُهُ الْمُجْتَمَعَاتُ الْعَرَبِيَّةُ الْحَضَرِيَّةُ فِي تَبَدُّلِ أَنْمَاطِ الِاحْتِفَالِ بِمُنَاسَبَاتِ الْمِيلَادِ وَالزَّوَاجِ وَالتَّخَرُّجِ.
sentences.translation: Promjena koja se odvija u arapskim urbanim društvima jasno se ogleda u načinu proslavljanja rođendana, vjenčanja i diplome.
sentences.translationEn: The transformation unfolding in Arab urban societies is clearly reflected in changing patterns of celebrating birthdays, weddings, and graduations.

sentences.arabic: إِذْ تَمَازَجَتِ التَّقَالِيدُ الْمَحَلِّيَّةُ بِعَنَاصِرَ ثَقَافِيَّةٍ وَافِدَةٍ، فَظَهَرَتْ أَعْرَاسٌ تَجْمَعُ الْحِنَّاءَ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةَ بِحَفَلَاتِ الدِّي جَي وَزِيَارَاتِ التَّصْوِيرِ الِاحْتِرَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Lokalne tradicije stopile su se s uvezenim kulturnim elementima, pa su se pojavila vjenčanja koja kombiniraju tradicijsku kanenicu s DJ nastupima i profesionalnim foto sesijama.
sentences.translationEn: Local traditions have blended with incoming cultural elements, giving rise to weddings that combine traditional henna nights with DJ parties and professional photo shoots.

sentences.arabic: تُعَبِّرُ هَذِهِ التَّحَوُّلَاتُ عَنْ تَفَاعُلٍ دِينَامِيكِيٍّ لَا عَنْ قَطِيعَةٍ مَعَ الْأَصَالَةِ بِحَسَبِ مَا يَرَاهُ كَثِيرٌ مِنْ عُلَمَاءِ الِاجْتِمَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Ove promjene izražavaju dinamičnu interakciju, a ne raskid s autentičnošću — kako smatra mnogo sociologa.
sentences.translationEn: These transformations express dynamic interaction rather than a break with authenticity, according to many sociologists.

sentences.arabic: غَيْرَ أَنَّ الْأَجْيَالَ الْأَكْبَرَ سِنًّا كَثِيرًا مَا تَأْسَفُ عَلَى بَعْضِ التَّقَالِيدِ الَّتِي تَرَاجَعَ حُضُورُهَا أَمَامَ مَوْجَةِ الِاقْتِبَاسَاتِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: No starije generacije često žale za nekim tradicijama čije je prisustvo ustuknulo pred valom kulturnih posuđivanja.
sentences.translationEn: However, older generations often lament certain traditions that have receded in the face of the wave of cultural borrowings.

sentences.arabic: يَبْقَى هَذَا التَّوَتُّرُ بَيْنَ الثَّابِتِ وَالْمُتَحَوِّلِ مَادَّةً خَصِيبَةً لِلنِّقَاشِ فِي أَوْسَاطِ الدِّرَاسَاتِ الثَّقَافِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova napetost između stalnog i promjenjivog ostaje plodno tlo za raspravu u krugovima kulturnih studija.
sentences.translationEn: This tension between the fixed and the changing remains fertile ground for debate in cultural studies circles.
